boundary.body: Current closure boundary for content-pack declared lander component intents, structured-data intents, core compilation, lander-react intent rendering, mdwrkcom host wiring, and no-drift governance.
boundary.title: Content-pack-driven lander rendering current closure

features.description: Declare MdWrk page, section, visible component, and structured-data intent as portable content-pack data without owning React component implementations.
features.title: mdwrkcom content-pack component intent declarations

features.description: Define and validate portable component intent schemas for content packs, rejecting unknown component kinds, malformed payloads, and app-local implementation references.
features.title: lander-content-contract component intent schema

features.description: Define and validate portable structured-data intent schemas for supported JSON-LD types before they enter lander-core compilation.
features.title: lander-content-contract schema intent schema

features.description: Compile validated content-pack page, section, component, metadata, and schema intent into a deterministic React-independent render model.
features.title: lander-core content-pack render model compiler

features.description: Normalize validated structured-data intent into compiled schema render-model entries with stable IDs, canonical URL metadata, and diagnostics.
features.title: lander-core schema intent compiler

features.description: Render compiled lander-core component intent through lander-react owned component registries and package-owned class surfaces.
features.title: lander-react compiled intent renderer

features.description: Map compiled structured-data intent kinds to lander-react reusable structured-data components and structured-data graph builders.
features.title: lander-react structured-data intent registry

features.description: Host the compiled lander renderer in mdwrkcom without hand-assembling governed lander component trees or choosing per-type structured-data components in page-local app code.
features.title: mdwrkcom compiled lander renderer host

features.description: Verify that content-pack declarations, lander-content-contract validation, lander-core render models, lander-react output, mdwrkcom hosted pages, JSON-LD artifacts, and static outputs do not drift.
features.title: Content-pack rendering no-drift governance
